prompt: A photorealistic forced-perspective street photography scene where a giant luxury baseball cap is being held in one hand in the foreground, creating the illusion of miniature scale. Sitting naturally on top of the cap is a beautiful young East Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a red oversized Adidas sweatshirt, loose light-blue baggy jeans, and classic white Adidas sneakers. She sits casually with both feet hanging over the curved crown of the cap, looking confidently at the camera with a relaxed expression. The cap features a clean embroidered Adidas Trefoil logo matching her outfit. Background shows a cinematic New York street at golden hour with warm sunlight, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, brick buildings, pedestrians, and urban atmosphere. Ultra-realistic DSLR photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, natural lighting, highly detailed fabric textures, realistic skin tones, premium fashion editorial style, centered composition, vertical 9: 16
